rows.protocol_short: OpenAI evaluates GPT-5.5 on HealthBench and HealthBench Professional as healthcare performance/safety benchmarks. Reported values are length-adjust...
rows.protocol_full: OpenAI evaluates GPT-5.5 on HealthBench and HealthBench Professional as healthcare performance/safety benchmarks. Reported values are length-adjusted scores; table cells also include unadjusted score and mean response length in characters. OpenAI notes that open-ended chat benchmarks can reward longer responses, so it reports length-adjusted HealthBench and HealthBench Professional scores. Length adjustment penalizes long answers with slopes reported as 2.53 for HealthBench Professional, 2.99 for HealthBench, 3.92 for HealthBench Hard, and 0.20 for HealthBench Consensus; shorter responses receive a corresponding positive adjustment. | Dataset: Length-adjusted HealthBench Professional score; table includes unadjusted score and mean response length.

dataset_variant: Dataset: Length-adjusted HealthBench Professional score; table includes unadjusted score and mean response length.
source_caveat: The source does not document enough shared evaluation settings for strict cross-report comparison. This result remains source-scoped.

rows.evidence_quote: GPT-5.5 has length-adjusted HealthBench scores of 56.5, 31.5, 95.6, and 51.8.
